product_overview: NaikApa helps commuters in Jabodetabek discover and compare multimodal route options (time, cost, convenience) and view step-by-step journey details with a simulated booking CTA. The app focuses on fast prototyping with a simple authentication entry point and locally mocked routing data.
core_goals: Allow users to quickly enter origin and destination and receive multimodal route comparisons
Present clear, comparable estimates for time and cost across route options
Provide step-by-step journey details for selected routes including intermodal transitions
Offer a visible booking CTA for ride-hailing (simulated) and a Google OAuth sign-in path for user context

features.name: Multimodal route search
features.description: Home page search form where users enter pickup and destination, then submit to see route comparison results.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Enter pickup location in Lokasi Penjemputan -> Enter destination in Lokasi Tujuan -> Submit the form with Cari Rute Terbaik -> Browser navigates to /routes?origin={origin}&destination={destination}
Navigate to / -> Leave Lokasi Penjemputan empty -> Enter destination in Lokasi Tujuan -> Submit the form with Cari Rute Terbaik -> See inline validation error for missing Lokasi Penjemputan

features.name: Route results list
features.description: Results page that fetches multimodal options via the /api/routes endpoint, shows loading state, lists route cards with estimates and actions to refine search or view details.
user_flows: Navigate to /routes?origin={origin}&destination={destination} -> View loading state while routes load -> API GET /api/routes?origin={origin}&destination={destination} returns route list -> See listed route cards with badges and estimates -> Click Lihat Detail & Perjalanan on a route card -> Browser navigates to /routes/r1 (selected route id)

Navigate to /routes?origin={origin}&destination={destination} -> View loading state while routes load -> API GET /api/routes?origin={origin}&destination={destination} returns empty list or error -> See message indicating no routes found or failed to load results -> Click Ubah Pencarian to return home -> Browser navigates to /

features.name: Route journey detail
features.description: A step-by-step timeline view for a selected route id that shows transitions, cost breakdown, and a CTA to book ride-hailing (simulated).
user_flows: Navigate to /routes/r1 -> Click Kembali ke Hasil Pencarian -> Browser navigates to /routes?origin={origin}&destination={destination}

Navigate to /routes/r1 -> Read journey steps and cost breakdown -> See Pesan Ride-Hailing Sekarang button (UI) -> Click Pesan Ride-Hailing Sekarang -> See simulated booking UI or intent confirmation (mocked)

Navigate to /routes/non-r1 -> Read page and observe generic title copy and sample steps -> Attempt to Click Pesan Ride-Hailing Sekarang -> See message or indicator that booking integration is not available for this sample id

features.name: Login
features.description: Sign-in screen offering Google OAuth and email/password fields (Google flows wired; email/password UI present but not fully implemented).
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Click Lanjutkan dengan Google to start OAuth -> Complete Google OAuth flow -> Be redirected to landing page or previous page as authenticated
Navigate to /login -> Optionally fill email and password fields -> Click Masuk -> See error or notice indicating email/password sign-in is not fully wired or does not complete end-to-end
Navigate to /login -> Click Lanjutkan dengan Google to start OAuth -> OAuth provider returns error or is cancelled -> See OAuth error state and remain on /login

routes.description: Landing page with hero and multimodal route search form
Sign-in with Google or email/password fields (UI)
Route comparison results; reads origin and destination from query string
Step-by-step journey detail for a selected route option

features.name: Multimodal route search
features.description: User enters pickup and destination on the home page and navigates to results.
user_interactions: Enter pickup location in Lokasi Penjemputan
Submit the form with Cari Rute Terbaik

features.name: Route results list
features.description: Fetches and displays multimodal options with time, cost, and links to detail.
user_interactions: View loading state while routes load
See listed route cards with badges and estimates
Click Ubah Pencarian to return home
Click Lihat Detail & Perjalanan on a route card

features.name: Route journey detail
features.description: Static demo of step-by-step guidance and ride-hailing CTA for a chosen route id.
user_interactions: Read journey steps and cost breakdown

features.name: Login
features.description: Google OAuth via better-auth; email and password fields and primary Masuk button are present in the UI.
user_interactions: Click Lanjutkan dengan Google to start OAuth
Optionally fill email and password fields

known_limitations.issue: Email/password Masuk and Daftar disini are not fully wired; only Google sign-in uses authClient
known_limitations.impact: Password login and registration flows may not complete end-to-end in automated tests

known_limitations.issue: Route detail page uses mock content keyed mainly by id r1 for intermodal copy
known_limitations.impact: Non-r1 ids show generic title copy while still showing sample steps
